question:
[Previous Feedback] Correct! A, C, and E all use the full datetime format with timezone offset.

Please draft the Tuesday progress sync report and save it as day02/progress_report_draft.json. Include these fields: report_date (today), generated_at (current time around 10:30), period_start (this Monday at 09:00), period_end (this Friday at 18:00), summary (a string), and milestones_status (an array).

- period_end: this Friday at 18:00 = March 20, 2026 at 18:00 = 2026-03-20T18:00:00+08:00
